title: Chiara Scotti: Digital money and the architecture of trust
body:
Welcome address by Ms Chiara Scotti, Deputy Governor of the Bank of Italy, at a workshop "Digital assets and monetary policy transmission", organised by the Bank of Italy, European Central Bank, Euro Area Business Cycle Network and Centre for Economic Policy Research, Rome, 4 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260505d.htm

title: Piero Cipollone: Digital assets, payment efficiency and monetary policy
body:
Speech by Mr Piero Cipollone, Member of the Executive Board of the European Central Bank, at a workshop "Digital assets and monetary policy transmission", organised by the European Central Bank, Bank of Italy, Euro Area Business Cycle Network and Centre for Economic Policy Research, Rome, 4 May 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260505a.htm

title: Christine Lagarde, Luis de Guindos: ECB press conference - introductory statement
body:
Introductory statement by Ms Christine Lagarde, President of the European Central Bank, and Mr Luis de Guindos, Vice-President of the European Central Bank, Frankfurt am Main, 30 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260430c.htm

title: Yannis Stournaras: On the contribution of the Economic and Financial Committee to the development of the euro area and future challenges
body:
Address by Mr Yannis Stournaras, Governor of the Bank of Greece, at the gala dinner of the EU Informal Economic and Financial Committee (EFC) meeting, Athens, 27 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260429d.htm

title: Burkhard Balz: Foundations of resilience - the role of cash and the digital euro
body:
Keynote speech by Mr Burkhard Balz, Member of the Executive Board of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the Global Currency Forum (GCF), Antalya, 29 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260429a.htm

title: Joachim Nagel: The digital euro - anchoring Europe's strategic autonomy in a digital future
body:
Keynote speech by Dr Joachim Nagel, President of the Deutsche Bundesbank, at the House of the Euro, Brussels, 22 April 2026.

Source URL: https://www.bis.org/review/r260428f.htm
